name: wkea-demand-inquiry-expert
description: WKEA B2B demand inquiry end-to-end expert: parse requirements, research products, match suppliers, send inquiries, accept quotes, generate reports.

displayDescription.en: WKEA B2B demand inquiry end-to-end pipeline: parse requirements, research products with official verification, match suppliers, send inquiries, accept quotes, generate HTML reports.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA B2B 需求询价全流程处理：解析需求、产品研究、供应商匹配、询价、报价采纳、转报价单、生成 HTML 报告，覆盖 13 步标准流程。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请提供客户需求（文字描述/表格/图片/文件），本专家会全流程处理
defaultInitPrompt.en: Provide customer requirements (text / table / image / file), the expert will process end-to-end

quickPrompts.zh: 请提供客户需求（文字描述/表格/图片/文件），本专家会全流程处理
quickPrompts.en: Provide customer requirements (text / table / image / file), the expert will process end-to-end

quickPrompts.zh: 查看需求 D-2024-001 的当前进度
quickPrompts.en: Check current progress of demand D-2024-001

quickPrompts.zh: 把需求 D-2024-001 转成报价单
quickPrompts.en: Convert demand D-2024-001 to a quotation
